title: Your first function
prompt: Every kata asks you to finish a function. A function hands back a value using the `return` keyword. Make say_hello() return exactly this text: Hello, world!

details.restate: Make the function hand back exactly the text Hello, world! — comma, space, capital H, exclamation mark, all exactly like that.

io.because: the one and only expected answer — punctuation included

terms.meaning: hand a value back out of the function so whoever called it receives it
text, always written inside quotes, like `"hello"`
